services.name: Pine Ridge Family Campsite
services.description: Enjoy a peaceful camping experience at Pine Ridge Family Campsite. This spacious campsite accommodates up to 6 guests and includes a fire pit, picnic table, nearby restrooms, potable water, and access to hiking trails. Perfect for families, couples, and outdoor enthusiasts.

services.name: Lakeside Pine Retreat Campsite
services.description:
Escape into nature at Lakeside Pine Retreat Campsite, a peaceful camping destination nestled beside a scenic lake. This spacious site accommodates up to 6 guests and is perfect for families, couples, and outdoor enthusiasts.

Features include:

• Private fire pit

• Picnic table

• Lake access

• Hiking trails

• Clean restrooms and showers

• Drinking water

• Free parking

• Pet-friendly

Whether you're planning a weekend getaway or a week-long adventure, Lakeside Pine Retreat offers the perfect balance of comfort and wilderness.

services.name: Homey Blue Door Cottage
services.description:
The Space

This charming, semi-private cottage is set in a quiet country location, perfect for your next getaway. Whether you're here to relax or need a quiet place to work, the cottage blends mid-century modern appeal with cozy country comfort.

  • Living Area: Featuring two restored antique Herman Miller chairs and a comfy love seat with a floor pouf ottoman.

  • Workspace: Includes a sleek, fold-away computer table for your laptop or extra surface space.

  • Kitchenette: Equipped with a sink, fridge, and microwave.

    • Note: There is no stove/oven in this unit.

  • Bathroom: A spa-like experience featuring a two-person shower with a rainfall shower head, bidet, and all essential toiletries.

Outdoor Luxury

  • Private Hot Tub: A 2-3 person tub located right on the cottage porch.

  • Pergola & Patio: Beautifully lit with string lights and furnished with Adirondack chairs.

  • Firepit: We provide plenty of dried wood, firestarters, and lighters. (Marshmallow roasters available upon request!)

  • Relaxation: Enjoy the hammock in the yard near the cottage.

Thoughtful Extras

  • Local Treats: Enjoy some famous locally grown microwave popcorn.

  • Coffee Bar: Keurig with various coffees, hot chocolate, and tea.

  • Peace of Mind: The property is equipped with a Generac generator to ensure power during any storms.

Amenities

  • Essentials: High-speed Wi-Fi (perfect for streaming), A/C, Heating, and TV.

  • Family Friendly: High chair, children's books/toys, and dinnerware available.

  • Convenience: Keypad self check-in, free parking, iron, and hair dryer.

  • Safety: Smoke alarm, carbon monoxide alarm, and fire extinguisher.

Stay Details

  • Check-In: 05:00 PM

  • Check-Out: 10:00 AM

  • Stay Limits: Minimum 2 nights, Maximum 7 nights.

  • Privacy Note: Our family lives across the lane. We respect your privacy but are available if you need anything! You may see some normal family activity on the property during your stay.

House Rules: No smoking inside. Smoking is permitted outside away from windows/doors; please dispose of butts properly.

services.name: Folsom Lake Haven | Sleeps 8 | 3 BR / 2.5 BA
services.description:
Escape to this stunning lakefront sanctuary just 25 minutes from Sacramento. This professionally designed home features floor-to-ceiling windows showcasing panoramic water views, a private boat dock, and direct beach access perfect for swimming, kayaking, and paddleboarding.​

Amenities:

  • Gourmet kitchen with gas range, double ovens, and outdoor BBQ

  • Smart home features including keyless entry and programmable thermostat​

  • High-speed WiFi (500+ Mbps) and 75" Smart TV with streaming services

  • Master suite with king bed and spa-inspired bathroom

  • Private dock with kayak and paddleboard storage

  • Covered deck with dining for 10 and fire pit

  • Central AC/heating, in-unit washer/dryer with detergent provided​

  • EV charging station available

Pricing: $425/night (2-night minimum) | Cleaning fee: $175
Perfect for: Family getaways, water sports enthusiasts, corporate retreats

services.name: The Midtown Modern | Sleeps 4 | 2 BR / 2 BA
services.description:
Experience urban sophistication in this designer loft located in the heart of Midtown's vibrant R Street corridor. Walk to 50+ restaurants, galleries, and the Golden 1 Center. This fully renovated industrial-chic space features exposed brick, 18-foot ceilings, and curated local artwork.​

Amenities:

  • Chef's kitchen with marble countertops and Nespresso machine

  • Dedicated workspace with ergonomic desk and monitor

  • Premium king and queen beds with luxury linens

  • High-speed gigabit WiFi and 65" Smart TV​

  • In-unit washer/dryer with eco-friendly detergent pods​

  • Secured parking garage (1 space included)

  • Rooftop deck access with city views

  • Locally sourced toiletries and welcome basket featuring Sacramento brands​

  • Smart thermostat and keyless entry​

Pricing: $285/night (no minimum) | Cleaning fee: $125
Perfect for: Business travelers, couples, concert-goers, food lovers
